name: Specialist Agent
tagline: Your AI development team — 27+ specialized agents
description: Build, review, debug, and ship production code faster. Supports Vue, React, Next.js, SvelteKit, Angular, Astro, and Nuxt with framework-specific patterns.

pricing.details: MIT Licensed - Free and open source

features.title: 7 Framework Packs
features.description: Vue 3, React, Next.js, SvelteKit, Angular, Astro, Nuxt with architecture patterns

features.title: Full & Lite Modes
features.description: Sonnet/Opus for complex tasks, Haiku for quick tasks (60-80% cheaper)

features.title: TDD Enforcer
features.description: @tdd blocks code without failing tests first

features.title: Unified Code Review
features.description: @reviewer checks spec, quality, and architecture in one pass

features.title: Checkpoint & Rollback
features.description: Git checkpoints after tasks, easy rollback

features.title: Autonomous Execution
features.description: Self-healing execution with progress reports and batch optimization

features.title: 6 Platforms
features.description: Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, Codex, OpenCode

features.title: Native Claude Code Hooks
features.description: Security guard, auto-dispatch, session context, auto-format — real automation

features.title: Security Guard
features.description: Blocks dangerous commands (rm -rf /, force push, DROP TABLE) before execution
